responses: Executing sleep... Error: too many thoughts running in background processes.
sleep.sh: blocked by phone, existential dread, and one more episode.
Permission denied. Your brain doesn't have sudo access to itself.
Warning: sleep may cause missed alarms, abandoned to-do lists, and 3 AM regret.
sudo: sleep: 3 hours of scrolling required before system shutdown.
Homework detected. Initiating procrastination protocol instead.
Error 404: motivation not found. Panic at 2 AM rescheduled automatically.
Homework queued for tomorrow. And the day after. Until it's due in 20 minutes.
Done! Just kidding. Enjoy the existential crisis of starting at 11:59 PM.
sudo: homework: operation requires root access to your work ethic.
Generating motivation... process killed. Restarting in 7-10 business days.
Motivation.exe crashed. Have you tried watching a 4-hour productivity video instead of doing the thing?
Loading motivation... 3%... 3%... 3%... connection lost.
Motivation package installed. Running it is a separate step. Good luck.
sudo motivation: command not found. Alternatives: YouTube, Twitter, ceiling staring.
Transfer: $10,000,000 to your account... failed. Insufficient vibes.
sudo getrich: access denied. Try again after winning the genetic lottery.
Wealth protocol initiated. ETA: one app idea, six years, two pivots, probably nothing.
Error: you need money to make money. Logic.exe has stopped responding.
Rich unlocked. Requires: an idea, execution, and luck. In that order. You only have the idea.
girlfriend.sh: skill check failed. Please upgrade social stats and retry.
Found: your pillow, 14 unfinished shows, and a loyalty that's honestly touching.
Error: no romantic.dll found. Have you considered talking to a human being?
Processing... rejected by 0 people because you asked a bot instead of talking to your crush.
sudo ineedagirlfriend: that's a command you typed as one word. The diagnosis is in the syntax.
Followers generated: +3 bots, +1 your mom's alt account.
Follower acquisition initiated. Warning: you may need to be interesting first.
followers.sh: adding 1 by posting something embarrassing that goes viral. You're welcome.
Error: algorithm thwarted. You haven't posted anything cringe-worthy enough.
Have you tried having a terrible opinion? Numbers go up fast.
diet.sh started. Cancelled at first smell of food.
Calorie deficit enabled. Overridden 40 minutes later by 'just this once.'
Body recomposition initiated. Progress report: ate two granola bars and called it clean eating.
sudo loseweight: achievable. First disable: late night snacks, delivery apps, and boredom eating.
Error: you Googled 'how to lose weight fast' instead of sleeping. This cycle is known.
focus.sh: initializing... distracted by notification. Reinitializing... distracted again.
Procrastination override: closing 14 tabs, putting phone face-down, finding actual willpower. Step 3 failed.
sudo focus: blocked by Reddit, YouTube, and the sudden urge to reorganize your files.
Flow state initiated. Duration: 7 minutes. Interrupted by: thirst, boredom, and a meme you had to send.
Productivity mode ON. Followed by 45 minutes of 'getting ready to start.'
Boredom detected. Generating activity... suggestion: open the same apps you just closed.
sudo beatboredom: you have 400 abandoned hobbies and a Netflix account. This is not boredom. This is avoidance.
Entertainment loaded: the ceiling, your thoughts, and a mild existential itch.
I'm also bored. We can do nothing together.
Boredom resolved by becoming more bored about not knowing what to do about being bored.
Anxiety.dll: can't stop, won't stop, currently scheduling fake disasters for 3 AM.
sudo fixanxiety: 247 background processes running simultaneously. Recommend: breathe out. Slowly. Slower.
Error: worry thread exceeded maximum recursion depth. Stack trace: everything, always.
Calm mode initiated. Overridden by 'what if it all goes wrong though.'
Anxiety reduced by 0%. Your brain added 3 new worries to compensate. Classic.
skipclass.sh: executed. Attendance -1. Regret +1. Understanding of the material: unchanged.
Class skipped. Enjoy 11 minutes of freedom before the guilt arrives.
Marked absent. Lecture you missed: probably important. Maybe. Enjoy not knowing.
sudo skipwork: email incoming — 'just checking in on that thing from last week.'
You're home doing nothing instead of being at school doing nothing. Net outcome: identical.
History cleared. Your browser doesn't remember. The websites do.
Deleting... found: 47 forgotten tabs, 3 regrets, and something we won't mention.
sudo deletehistory: complete. Incognito mode: should have been active already.
Cache cleared. You're new. Don't type the same things again or you'll get the same results.
History deleted. What were you hiding? Never mind. I respect the silence.
Argument strategy deployed. Results: they doubled down. Of course they did.
Win condition: be right. Also be someone they want to admit is right. That's the hard part.
sudo winargument: logical fallacies detected on their side. Also yours. It's a draw.
Perfect comeback queued. Delivery scheduled for 3 AM when you're lying awake thinking of it.
Being right and winning the argument are different commands. You asked for one. You needed the other.
sudo makeparentsproud: requires a stable job, a partner, and an explanation of what you actually do all day.
Processing parental approval... blocked by unsolicited advice and 'we just want what's best for you.'
They already told everyone about the one thing you did three years ago. That's the proud. It counts.
Pride level: pending. Estimated arrival: after you do the thing they've mentioned four times.
Expectation gap detected. Smaller than you think. Wider than they admit.
The most effective method is being genuinely happy. The most common method is posting gym selfies at 6 AM.
Operation: looking great without them. Status: going great. Side effect: you forgot to check if they noticed.
They liked your story. Now what.
sudo moveon: recommended. Technically harder. Statistically more effective than the jealousy route.
ex.sh: warning — they're not checking your profile as often as you're checking theirs.
sudo talktocrush: speech module loaded. Cancelled by overthinking, 'what if they say no,' and 40 mental rehearsals.
Say something. Anything. Or don't, and wonder forever. Classic two-option routing.
crush.sh: message drafted. Edited 7 times. Deleted. Re-drafted. App closed. Reopened. You know how this ends.
sudo confess: courage check... failed. Rescheduled for 'the right moment,' pending for 6 months.
Found: your crush. Opened: chat window. Next step: the one you already know. You just don't want to do it.
sudo deleteinstagram: app removed. Reinstalled 4 days later. All-time record.
Screen time limit set: 30 minutes. Ignored within 8.
Social media fast initiated. Update: you checked Twitter from a browser. The spirit was not with you.
Notifications silenced. Peace unlocked. Lasted until something happened and you needed to share it.
You've been on this app for 2 hours. Here's a meme anyway. You're staying.
Confidence.exe loading... fake it first. The brain syncs up eventually. Probably.
sudo beconfident: requires embarrassing yourself enough times that you stop caring. You need more reps.
Confidence installed. Warning: may cause accidental honesty, speaking first, and overconfidence.
Your inner critic has filed an objection. Overrule it anyway.
Faking confidence until you make it is a valid deployment strategy.
sudo makefriends: talk to someone more than once. Then again. Then about something real. That's literally it.
Friend acquisition: you're waiting for it to happen naturally. The natural method is also the terrifying method.
Error: you've been in the same spot for 6 months. New input required.
Friends found: 0 new results. Suggestion: say something in a server you're already in. Baby steps.
Proximity + repeated exposure + mutual vulnerability. Not efficient. Only method that works.
sudo wakeupearly: alarm set for 6 AM. Snoozed 4 times. Result: 9:37 AM. Another chance tomorrow.
Morning person mode: installing... failed. Your circadian rhythm has filed a counter-suit.
Woke up at 6. Immediately checked phone. Congratulations, you're awake and already ruined it.
sudo 5amroutine: rejected. Your bed has root access. You do not.
Alarm acknowledged. Body unresponsive. Brain online at 10:47 AM after approximately 3 coffees.
sudo befamous: something happens to you. The internet decides. You can't control step 2.
Error: popularity requires extreme talent, a relatable flaw, or impeccable timing. Pick one.
Social capital: boosted by showing up consistently and not being weird in the specific ways people don't forgive.
The people who stopped trying to be popular are usually the ones who got there. Paradox detected.
Popularity algorithm: unclear. Possibly vibes-based. Be good at one thing publicly and wait.
Adult.exe has crashed. Taxes are due, fridge is empty, and no one is coming to fix it.
sudo adult: your parents were also guessing. This information releases to everyone at age 25.
Adulting skill check: grocery shopping — passed. Cooking it — failed. Ordering delivery — nailed it.
Error: you thought you'd feel like an adult by now. That feeling is arriving late. ETA: never.
sudo paytaxes: done. Repeat next year, forever, while understanding it less each time.
sudo raisegpa: detected pattern — 9-hour all-nighters don't work. Known since grade 9. Still deployed every semester.
GPA calculation: current trajectory requires studying. Actual trajectory: panic, energy drinks, and hope.
Grade upgrade blocked by: one class you hate, one professor you can't follow, and a group project that's your whole grade.
sudo passexam: caffeine maxed. Preparation minimal. Last time it worked, actually. Barely.
Academic boost: requires care → sleep → attend → study. First link in chain: broken.
Checking your balance... found: insufficient funds, a Spotify subscription you forgot about, and three charges from last week.
sudo getmoney: the algorithm requires money to recommend making money. Catch-22.exe.
Funds transferred: $0.00. You didn't have it, and I can't make it appear. Thoughts and prayers.
Budget analysis complete. Biggest leak: convenience. Second biggest: convenience again.
Error: you spent $14 on coffee 6 times this week. The money is there. It's just in cups.
sudo cram: initiated at 11pm for a 9am exam. Optimal scheduling confirmed.
Knowledge transfer in progress... 4% complete... 6 hours remaining... good luck.
Exam.exe: you are now Googling things you should have learned three weeks ago.

on energy drink number 4
rereading the same paragraph for the 6th time
watching a 40-minute review video at 2x speed
outcome: ETA: never, but the exam is in 7 hours
result: somehow passed anyway, mechanism unknown
